model_comparison: Both models generate high-quality, natural-sounding audio with accurate content. The decisive factor is the adherence to the 'Medium speed' (中速) constraint. Model 2 (T2) takes about 13 seconds, creating a distinct, moderate pace that allows for clearer processing of the information without dragging. T2's pacing is much closer to a standard 'Medium' reading rate, whereas T1 leans significantly towards 'Fast'. Therefore, T2 follows the paralinguistic instruction more accurately.
